headline: Insulet (PODD): Deutsche Bank Initiates Coverage With a Buy and a $190 Target
summary: Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) is one of the best stocks to invest in according to Two Sigma Advisors with huge upside potential. On June 23, Deutsche Bank analyst Kieran Ryan initiated coverage on Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) with a Buy rating and a price target of $190. Ryan views Insulet as the dominant player in the tubeless […]

headline: FDA Classifies Insulet Omnipod Recall as Serious After Injury Reports
summary: FDA classified Insulet's Omnipod pod recall as Class I after reports of insulin under-delivery linked to 24 serious injuries.

raw.headline: FDA Classifies Insulet Omnipod Recall as Serious After Injury Reports

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Insulet, Lowers Price Target to $180
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Daniel Markowitz   maintains Insulet (NASDAQ:PODD) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $200 to $180.

headline: Insulet Accelerates Global Growth with Launch of Omnipod® 5 and Omnipod Discover™ in Spain, Expanding Access to Tubeless Diabetes Technology
summary: ACTON, Mass., July 06, 2026--Insulet Accelerates Global Growth with Launch of Omnipod 5 and Omnipod Discover in Spain, Expanding Access to Tubeless Diabetes Technology

headline: Insulet Launches Its Omnipod 5 Automated Insulin Delivery And Proprietary Data Management System Omnipod Discover In Spain
summary: Spain is the 26th country where Insulet sells Omnipod, and the 20th country where Omnipod 5 is available, further accelerating Insulet’s mission to transform the lives of people with diabetes around the world.
